mapper.sql: id, room_id, subject, booker_id, booker_name, start_time_ms, end_time_ms, attendee_count, status, approval_status, remark, version, recurrence_type, recurrence_end_date, parent_id, series_index, created_at_ms, updated_at_ms
mapper.select: select from booking where booker_id = #{bookerId} order by start_time_ms desc
